slots.caption_ig:
A restaurant gets 4.7 stars. One of its dishes is 5 stars, three are 3. The average hides everything that matters. We rank the dish. That's it. That's the whole product.

#ForkFox #DishNotRestaurant #FoodRanked #FoodSmart #FoodAI
slots.caption_fb: Restaurant ratings are an average that erases the only signal that matters: the dish. You're not eating the restaurant. You're eating one specific thing. We rank the dish itself — not the place around it — so you can pick what's actually best for what you want tonight.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Editorial photograph of a single plate centered on a dark wood table. Dramatic single-source lighting from upper-right. The dish has a thin red outline glow indicating it's been ranked #1. No text. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 6s. Top-down. A 4.7-star generic restaurant card on screen, then it dissolves into a single ranked dish with a red #1 tag. End frame: 'We rank dishes.' (white) 'Not restaurants.' (red on 'dishes').
